name: Pramila Memorial Institute - Baguiati

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Please read this
This year my son is in class 6c and he is always bullied by his classmates even though the teacher says that to my son always that you should learn from the toppers but the toppers only are bulling my child and my child is little bit slow in speech so the teachers also making fun of my son. Please regurd me.
Thank you

So staring this school is the best school as said by some uneducated people but I REALLY DON'T KNOW WHY THEY SAY THIS ..LIKE this is a very bad school.... teachers are partial to the weak and average students. They only show their sweetness to the ones who are good in academics or sports.
People think that if they put their child in this school they will become toppers because many topper passed out from this school but belive me the one who were passed with high marks they did it with their efforts and the school didn't do anything
Most of the secondary teachers teach incorrect things and when the student says that it's wrong they neglect them saying we are the teachers and we know more.

At the time of admission they will ensure their full support to you but after that they will behave biased . The rector and principal will act sweet in front of everyone but if you go to them for issues they will insult you and put blame on your child
Only some of the teachers here can be said good by everyone but majority of them insults the parents and children. The teachers (not every) don't have manners . They give wrong information many times.

So, being a student of this school I personally know how this school works and will be able to give reviews on it.
Firstly starting with me as a student, not good at studies, a bit playful and jolly and talkative sometimes.
Now let's get into the school.
Teachers: (Not all the teachers though) Some teachers basically bully the children, especially the ones who are poor at studying. Instead of helping them out, all they do is nepotism. They give the toppers more attention than the average and the poor graders and scold them for not being able to schore well. Sometimes when the students try to go against them and tell them their faultall they do is question the education given by familieswhich is indirectly insulting them. Even after being aco-ed school, the boys and girls are not equalized. Boys are given more priority than the girls. The psychology teacher doesn't even let the students sit comfortably and sometimes she even tells th female students to sit in which will so called valid in front of the male students. The girls are told to change their habits because of the boys.
Principal: She is the most undeserving principal ever. She is the head of doing partiality among the students. Students are given importance based on their academic grades only.
According to me the Rector of the school is good because she is kind andfriendly with the children.she sees every child equally no matter who he or she is.

The children should not be afraid of the teachers and be friendly with them. In this school it's different, they are not afraid of the teachers but they are not friendly too.
The school says that they look after the mental health of the children bit that's false. The school only ruins the mental health of the students.
Class XI is having two exams in a month. They get no time to learn the topics.

If you want to see you child healthy then please don't admit them in this school.

Reshmi madam is the main sculptor behind the growth of the school, a very good person who is strict & maintain discipline as well as helping in nature to many students.
Biggest threat to the school: As per my experience and perception biggest threat to the school is Madam Manisha in all respect she is harmful to students as well as to some teachers also. From my time i.e 2011 i have seen her doing partiality to few students one of them was in my batch as they fetch high marks in school annual examinations(yes only marks with very low grasp on the concepts of subjects, just learn and mug up like a cow). I saw that batchmate after icse result which reflects the results of extreme pampering by manisha madam. Apart from these, she and some teachers behaves in rude manners with parents which also lowers the dignity of the school.

WORST SCHOOL EVER!
honestly speaking, as a student I have experienced this school
Horrible experience, I have observed teachers over here instead of being so friendly they try to insult the students infront of everyone without any actual reason. They don't have any manners how to speak with the parents and students. They treat them so horribly!!
This is specially for the secondary teachers, the SCIENCE teachers
no respect, no manners nothing
even the principal doesn't take any action against them.
